title: cerastium dolosum
intro: Cerastium dolosum, also known as the alpine chickweed or frostweed, is a low-growing, perennial herb that belongs to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of cerastium dolosum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and minor burns, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Cerastium dolosum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health issues, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
